svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.2.5 Chrome/138.0.7204.251 Electron/37.6.1 Safari/537.36" version="28.2.5" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="zwcf6aJKKamoCGs40g-I" name="主从同步双写+双机异步刷盘"> <mxGraphModel dx="1042" dy="722" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1800" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-21" value="" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="652.5" y="280" width="190" height="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-20" value="" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="270" y="280" width="190" height="231" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-23" value="① 发送消息" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;rounded=1;shadow=1;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="687.5" y="180" width="114" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-24" value="Master PageCache
(内存)" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;rounded=1;shadow=1;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="681" y="304" width="129" height="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-25" value="Master CommitLog
(磁盘)" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;rounded=1;shadow=1;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="687.5" y="440" width="120" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-26" value="Slave PageCache
(内存)" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;rounded=1;shadow=1;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="304" y="305" width="121" height="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-27" value="Slave CommitLog
(磁盘)" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;rounded=1;shadow=1;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="308" y="440" width="113" height="47" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-28" value="② 写入 Master 内存" style="startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.3;exitY=1;entryX=0.32;entryY=0;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-23" target="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-24"> <mxGeometry x="0.0528" y="-2" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-29" value="③ 同步数据复制
(阻塞等待 Slave)" style="startArrow=none;endArrow=block;strokeWidth=3;exitX=0;exitY=0.25;entryX=1;entryY=0.25;rounded=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-24" target="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-26"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-30" value="④ 内存写入完成 ACK" style="startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.75;entryX=0;entryY=0.75;rounded=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-26" target="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-24"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-31" value="⑤ 响应 Producer
(发送成功)" style="startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.82;exitY=0;entryX=0.86;entryY=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-24" target="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-23"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-32" value="⑥ 异步刷盘
(后台线程唤醒)" style="dashed=1;dashPattern=2 3;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);" edge="1" parent="1" source="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-24" target="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-25"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-33" value="⑦ 异步刷盘
(后台线程唤醒)" style="curved=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=2 3;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);" edge="1" parent="1" source="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-26" target="8X9xn3OnpSIlGs13EM-q-27"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aeCbY0Gy9I1baFlDF5SV-1" value="Slave 节点" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;rounded=1;shadow=1;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="324.5" y="260" width="80" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aeCbY0Gy9I1baFlDF5SV-2" value="Master 节点" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;rounded=1;shadow=1;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="703.75" y="511" width="87.5" height="29" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
